tagline: Allen's trusted HVAC company. NATE-certified technicians, same-day service.

quickReplies.label: What does a new system cost?

faq.q: How often should I service my AC?
faq.a: Once a year minimum — ideally in spring before the cooling season. Our maintenance plans include both spring and fall tune-ups.

faq.q: How much does a new AC system cost?
faq.a: Depending on home size and efficiency: $3,500-$7,000 installed. We do a Manual J load calculation to size it properly.

faq.q: What SEER rating should I get?
faq.a: Texas minimum is 15 SEER. We recommend 16-18 SEER for the DFW climate — the energy savings pay back the difference in 3-4 years.
Yes. 0% for 12 months on systems over $3,000 through GreenSky. Longer terms available.
Allen, McKinney, Fairview, Lucas, Celina, and surrounding North DFW communities.
